meaning: adj.骇人听闻的,非常讨厌的,不正当的
examples: It is shocking that nothing was said.
In the exhibition, abstract paintings are juxtaposed with shocking photographs.
There are rogues and there are flubs, however, and even the flubs have been shocking.
Ericsson is plunging by 15% in pre-market trading after shocking investors with a major margin squeeze.
